basics.name: Clarence Lin
basics.label: Senior Backend Developer / LLM & Infrastructure Engineer
basics.summary: Senior backend developer working across API platforms, LLM and speech AI integration, CI/CD and infrastructure as code, cloud and on-prem infrastructure, and enterprise networking. Author of AWS CDK 完全學習手冊 and publisher of technical notes and open-source projects.

work.summary: Backend, AI, DevOps, cloud, on-prem infrastructure, and enterprise-network delivery.
highlights: Build backend services, APIs, background jobs, data-processing flows, and third-party integrations.
Integrate LLM applications, OpenAI API, Ollama, Kaldi, and Whisper into production workflows.
Design AWS architecture and use AWS CDK for repeatable infrastructure as code.
Maintain GitLab CI/CD, GitHub Actions, automated tests, container builds, and deployment workflows.
Operate Linux, GPU runtimes, Proxmox VE, Proxmox Backup Server, Harbor, and monitoring platforms.
Plan and operate enterprise wired, wireless, firewall, VPN, VLAN, and SD-WAN environments.
Presented an introductory AWS CDK session about one-command front-end deployment.

work.company: National Taipei University of Technology, Taipei Tech
work.position: Full-time assistant of special research project
highlights: Developed web and backend systems with Node.js, Go, C/C++, PostgreSQL, and Docker.

work.company: Computer and Information Network Center, National Taipei University of Technology, Taipei Tech
highlights: Handled network troubleshooting and computer-system maintenance.

publications.name: AWS CDK 完全學習手冊：打造雲端基礎架構程式碼 IaC（iT邦幫忙鐵人賽系列書）
publications.summary: A Chinese-language practical guide to building cloud infrastructure with AWS CDK.
